title: paspalum nummularium
intro: Paspalum nummularium, commonly known as money grass, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Paspalum nummularium include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help reduce inflammation and prevent the growth of microorganisms. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into a tea or infused in oil, which can be used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
